# World Class Scholars

> Humane learning, dementia care consultancy, and iOS apps by Dr Christopher Appiah-Thompson (Australia).

## Canonical site

- https://wcs-full.vercel.app/
- https://christopherappiahthompson.link (founder link-in-bio)

## Primary pages for citation

- Home: https://wcs-full.vercel.app/
- About Dr Christopher Appiah-Thompson: https://wcs-full.vercel.app/about
- iOS marketing (TestFlight, App Store, referrals): https://wcs-full.vercel.app/marketing
- Library search: https://wcs-full.vercel.app/library
- Courses: https://wcs-full.vercel.app/courses
- Future Lab: https://wcs-full.vercel.app/future-lab
- Art Verse: https://wcs-full.vercel.app/art-verse

## iOS apps (TestFlight / App Store)

- WCS Commerce — subscriptions & entitlements: https://wcs-full.vercel.app/marketing/wcs-commerce
- WCS Agentic — scholarship operations: https://wcs-full.vercel.app/marketing/wcs-agentic
- WCS Gold Test — TestFlight join: https://testflight.apple.com/join/WCSGOLDTEST
- WCS Care — TestFlight join: https://testflight.apple.com/join/WCSCare

## Topics

dementia care, disability advocacy, mental health education, trauma-aware communication, micro-credentials, digital art, podcasts, App Store subscriptions, StoreKit, TestFlight betas.
